specific_question: How many IT-related routine tasks could MediConn Solutions' AI-integrated ITSM automate?
answer: According to a IT department survey in May of 2025, MediConn Solutions' AI-integrated ITSM could automate 95% of its routine tasks. This would significantly reduce the IT staff workload.
dr_question: How would incorporating  AI-IT Service Management (ITSM) allow MediConn Solutions' IT Service Desk employees to become more efficient and effective in 2026?
